title: Festive Cranberry Fry
description: A peppery and dense Egyptian dish featuring dried cranberries that can be enjoyed as a snack or side dish.
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine dried cranberries with olive oil, cumin seeds, minced garlic, salt, black pepper, and onion powder.
Mix well until the cranberries are evenly coated in the seasoning mixture.
Spread the seasoned cranberries on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Ensure they are spread out in an even layer to allow for even cooking.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes or until the edges start to brown slightly and the cranberries are crispy.
Once done, remove from the oven and let it cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before serving.
